sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13782" key="a)posperma/tisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσπερμ-άτισις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰτ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">emission of semen,</tr_> Sch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.329F.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
